hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import sys, json, re
try:
    data = json.load(sys.stdin)
    path = data.get('file_path', '')
    if re.search(r'\.docket/tickets/TKT-\d+\.md$', path):
        tkt = re.search(r'(TKT-\d+)\.md$', path).group(1)
        print(f'WARNING: Reading {path} directly. Use: docket show {tkt} --format context')
except Exception:
    pass
"
